summary: Compact current status while preserving M0-M7 historical ledger evidence
acceptance_criteria: Keep a concise R0 current snapshot at the top of PROJECT_STATUS.md.
Move or clearly mark old M0-M7 material as historical ledger without rewriting M0-M6 Gate results.
Ensure docs/29 remains the accepted forward Roadmap and docs/11/docs/23 remain synchronized to R0-R8.
Preserve evidence paths, PR numbers, commits, and rejected-direction context needed for audit.
Do not delete historical M7 renderer evidence or product-owner rejection records.
required_tests: node -e parse all changed JSON files
git diff --name-only check proving no forbidden paths changed
notes: This task may compact process/status documentation only.
No product code, Gate document rewrite, ADR rewrite, or historical fact reinterpretation is authorized.
next_action: Move the full pre-compaction status into the exact independent history ledger path, rebuild a concise current PROJECT_STATUS snapshot, preserve roadmap references, then route to independent QA.

scope_reconciliation.reason: docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md requires historical milestone records to move into an independent history/ledger; the original task allowed_paths omitted the destination path.
